keywords: Stripe payment processing gateway transactions billing subscriptions
description: Payment processing platform handling transactions at global scale
patterns: Idempotency keys to deduplicate retried payment requests
Two-phase commit across ledger and bank network calls
Event-driven state machine for payment lifecycle (created → processing → succeeded/failed)
PostgreSQL with append-only ledger for financial auditability
Kafka for async webhook delivery with exponential backoff retry
Rate limiting per API key via Redis token bucket
PCI-DSS compliant vault for card data tokenization
